name: The Rider
short_description:
A minimalist wall art illustration by Elizabeth Arnau inspired by a Vogue fashion editorial. Immerse yourself in the wild freedom of the subtle desert wind, capturing the poetry in every movement. Limited edition prints available on maxi canvas and framed in premium paper. Only 25 units per size.

FRAMED PRINT:

  • Framed in a classically elegant timeless gallery style
  • Wooden frame
  • Pure-white museum-quality passe-partout
  • Covered with polished acrylic glass

CANVAS PRINT:

  • High-quality canvas stretched over a handcrafted pine wood frame with FSC certification.
  • Solvent-free HP inks, UV-resistant.

name: Rouge Mug
short_description:
Whether you’re drinking your morning coffee, evening tea, or something in between – this mug’s for you! It’s sturdy and glossy with a vivid minimal print that’ll withstand the microwave and dishwasher.

  • Ceramic
  • 11 oz mug dimensions: 3.85″ (9.8 cm) in height, 3.35″ (8.5 cm) in diameter
  • Dishwasher and microwave safe
  • Great gift for family, friends and homewarmings

name: La Dame Mug
short_description:
Feel the magic of Paris and the sophistication of haute couture in every sip with La Dame cup. It’s sturdy and glossy with a vivid print that’ll withstand the microwave and dishwasher.

• Ceramic
• 11 oz mug dimensions: 3.85″ (9.8 cm) in height, 3.35″ (8.5 cm) in diameter
• Dishwasher and microwave safe

name: Audrey Vogue Mug
short_description:
Have breakfast at Tiffany’s every morning with Audrey Vogue Mug, the most glamorous way to enjoy the coziness of coffee/tea time.

· [Material]: Ceramic
· [Capacity]: 11 oz(325ml)
· [Size]: 3.85″ (9.8 cm) in height, 3.35″ (8.5 cm) in diameter
· [Print Position]: Double-sided printing
· [Occasion]: Great gift for friends and family.
· [Care Instruction]: Dishwasher and microwave safe
· [Type]: Durable ceramic mug with a large handle easy to grip. Suitable for hot and cold drinks.

name: Audrey Vogue Pink Cushion
short_description:
The chicest and coziest cushion featuring the iconic Audrey Hepburn, originally illustrated by Elizabeth Arnau. This accent pillow is the perfect gift for a housewarming gift, for fashion lovers and for those nostalgic for the elegance of haute couture.

PRINTED ON BOTH SIDES.

– Pattern/picture is on both sides in 2 different color versions (white and pink)
– 2 sizes available: 18×18 inch (45x45cm) or 22×22 inch (55x55cm)
– Cover and insert included
– 100% polyester case and insert
– Machine-washable case
– Hidden zipper
– Fabric weight: 6.49–8.85 oz/yd² (220–300 g/m²)
– Shape-retaining polyester insert included (handwash only)

name: Audrey Vogue cushion
short_description:
A strategically placed accent can bring the whole room to life, and this Audrey Vogue cushion is just what you need to do that. Two side different color designs that will match different interior styles. What’s more, the soft, machine-washable case with the shape-retaining insert is a joy to have long afternoon naps on.

Available in 2 sizes: 22″x 22″ (55 x 55 cm) and 18″ x 18″ (45 x 45 cm).

• Pillow case and filling included

• Machine-washable case

• Hidden zipper

• 100% polyester case and stuffing

• Fabric weight: 6.49–8.85 oz/yd² (220–300 g/m²)

• Shape-retaining polyester pillow’s stuffing included (handwash only)

name: Pink Champagne Purse
short_description:
Pink Champagne Long Handbag by Elizabeth Arnau

This chic purse is a must for practicality, security and style. Inspired by the parisian romance and its magic wrapped in champagne bubbles by the Tour Eiffel.

  • Size: 20cm (7.9″) x 10.5cm (4.1″ ) x 2.5cm (1″)
  • Large capacity: more than enough to slot all your cards, cash and mobile phone.
  • Excellent quality: Each wallet is unique, stitched together in a carefully selected PU textured leather of first quality for a long-lasting life.

This product would normally take 6-7 business days to manufacture and we will ship your order immediately after production.

name: Catwalk Sweatshirt
short_description:
This sweatshirt is both durable and soft – a great combination if you’re looking for that casual chic wardrobe staple.

  • 95%Cotton+5% Spandex
  • Single-Sided Area Printing, Front print area
  • Comfort: good warmth touch, micro elasticity, loose fit version.
  • Exquisite workmanship: fine threadwork with neat threadlines.
  • High grade elastic fabric: sweat absorption, air permeability, no deformation, no pilling.
  • Design: Timeless design, the sweater is easy to match with your everyday clothes, suitable for all alike.

This product would normally take 3-5 business days to manufacture and we will ship your order immediately after production.

name: Rouge Doux
short_description:

name: Dolce Vita
short_description:
Elevate your space with this exclusive Limited Edition print by Elizabeth Arnau. Featuring a striking Art Deco-inspired silhouette on a bold navy blue canvas (80x80cm), this nautical piece evokes la Dolce Vita at the Côte d’Azur. Perfect for restaurants, hotels, private kitchens, or living rooms—pair it with a gin and tonic, and let the elegance shine!

Unframed. Limited to 25 prints per size.

All prints are produced to order and delivery use to take between 5 and 10 business days.

name: Martini time
short_description:
Elevate your space with this exclusive Limited Edition print by Elizabeth Arnau. Featuring a striking Art Deco-inspired silhouette on a bold yellow canvas (80x80cm), it’s the perfect statement piece for your interior. Ideal for restaurants, hotels, private kitchens, or living rooms—pair it with a Martini and let the elegance shine!

Limited to 25 prints.

name: Kiss of Darkness
short_description:
Limited Edition print in canvas by Elizabeth Arnau. The marriage of day and night whispers silent words of desire, emerging in two nude bodies connected by an electric and unavoidable impulse.

This giclée is printed in a premium extra white squared canvas 800x800mm and 4cm depth that provides a great stability, extra-strength and an impressive visual effect without need of framing. Hand-stretched over a quality spruce wood frame and produced using solvent-free HP Latex Inks. Ready to hang.

Limited to 25 prints.

name: Seduction
short_description:
Limited Edition print in canvas by Elizabeth Arnau. A timeless black and white piece with a sensual red touch. The simplicity and powerful stroke of this artwork is ideally integrated into multiple minimalist interior designs

This giclée is printed in a premium extra white squared canvas 800x800mm and 4cm depth that provides a great stability, extra-strength and an impressive visual effect without need of framing. Hand-stretched over a quality spruce wood frame and produced using solvent-free HP Latex Inks. Ready to hang.

name: The Wave II
short_description:
Limited Edition Black & White Print by Elizabeth Arnau. «The Wave» is a metaphor of the wild and mysterious beauty of the ocean like women’s nature and their essence. The simplicity and powerful stroke of this art piece is ideally integrated into multiple minimalist interior designs

This giclée is printed in a premium extra white squared canvas 800x800mm and 4cm depth that provides a great stability, extra-strength and an impressive visual effect without need of framing. name: Chanel Nº5 Parfum
short_description:
Limited Edition Print of Chanel Nº5 Parfum by Elizabeth Arnau.

Add a touch of glamour to your living room or bedroom with this alluring artwork evoking the femininity and sophistication of Chanel fragrance and Haute Couture.

Available on canvas or on paper in 3 popular sizes: 400x400mm, 600x600mm and 800x800mm. Choose the format that best suits your needs:

CANVAS:

Printed on extra white and finely textured canvas. Hand-stretched over a quality spruce wood frame and produced using solvent-free HP Latex Inks. Its 4cm depth gives the structure great stability and gallery visual effect without framing.

PAPER:

Giclée printed on 310gsm fine art deluxe paper, slightly textured and cream tone Art Gallery quality. Ideal for those who want to personalize the illustration with an specific frame to match their interior design.

name: DUO Catwalk
short_description:
Limited Edition Prints by Elizabeth Arnau of two rock star divas walking down the runway.

These giclées are printed in premium canvas. Available in 2 sizes: A3 and A1 with 4cm depth providing a great stability, extra-strength and an impressive visual effect without need of framing. Hand-stretched over a quality spruce wood frame and produced using solvent-free HP Latex Inks. Ready to hang.

Buying this combo you safe 100€. Separately they would cost 50€ extra each one.

name: Customized
short_description:
Get a customized portrait of yourself or your beloved ones by Elizabeth Arnau unique style.

Send an email to: contact@elizabetharnau.com to discuss any specification and attach some pictures of reference. You will receive the illustration in digital format (in high resolution jpg file).

Moreover you can receive the portrait printed on any object, such as a canvas, a framed poster, a cup of coffee or a cushion for an additional charge:

  • + 20€ printed in a cup
  • + 32€ printed in a cushion
  • + 100€ printed in a canvas 80x80cm

name: Le Couture II
short_description:
Limited Edition Print by Elizabeth Arnau belonging to her collection «Le Couture», recreating the parisian sophistication of the Haute Couture from the 50’s. Available on canvas or on paper. Choose the format that best suits your needs:

CANVAS:

Giclée printed in a premium extra white squared canvas. Available in two extra-large sizes: Landscape A1 (841x594mm) and Squared 800x800mm, both with 4cm depth that provides a great stability, extra-strength and an impressive visual effect without need of framing. Hand-stretched over a quality spruce wood frame and produced using solvent-free HP Latex Inks. Ready to hang.

PAPER:

Giclée printed on 310gsm fine art deluxe paper, slightly textured and cream tone. Available in Landscape sizes A4, A3, A2 and A1. Ideal for those who want to personalize the illustration with an specific frame to match their interior design.

Unframed.

name: Le Couture I
short_description:
Limited Edition Print by Elizabeth Arnau belonging to her collection «Le Couture», recreating the parisian sophistication of the Haute Couture from the 50’s. Available on canvas or on paper. Choose the format that best suits your needs:

CANVAS:

Print on extra white and finely textured canvas. Carefully spread by hand. Ready to hang, its 4cm depth gives the structure great stability and gallery visual effect without framing.

PAPER:

Giclée printed on 310gsm fine art deluxe paper, slightly textured and cream tone. Ideal for those who want to personalize the illustration with an specific frame to match their interior design.

Unframed.
